rows.label: qev013105_MSG0001
rows.name:
WILL YOU UNLOCK THE SAFE? 
THEN PLEASE PRESENT THE KEY.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0002
rows.name: VALIDATING KEY...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0003
rows.name: AUTHENTICATING...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0005
rows.name: THEN PLEASE PRESENT THE REMAINING THREE KEYS.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hahahaha! This one fell for it too!! 
No matter how many times we do it, this method is foolproof![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0007
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! 
That safe won't open without the keys of the survivors 
from that team... all four of them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_JNK0010
rows.name: Insist

rows.label: qev013105_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if they were all in on it.

rows.label: qev013105_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev013105_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about the existence of the fourth key.

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0008
rows.name:
Didn't notice, did you? 
Simple as that, right, Fosdyke![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0009
rows.name:
You're going to die here anyway. 
Why does that matter?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0010
rows.name: Hah! It worked again this time, Fosdyke![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0011
rows.name:
They immediately trust you when you show them 
a falling out among friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even if they doubt an individual, they don't suspect everyone... 
People are such simple creatures![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0013
rows.name:
No one will find us here, and we won't be suspected. 
It's the safest, most surefire, and perfect strategy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0014
rows.name:
As long as we have Briggs's realistic acting, 
everyone will be fooled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0015
rows.name: Don't poke fun at me, youngster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0016
rows.name:
Still, coming all the way out here blinded by money 
in a life-or-death situation... Earthlings really are greedy bastards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0017
rows.name: Look who's talking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0018
rows.name: You too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0019
rows.name:
You too... 
Now, let's do this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0020
rows.name:
WILL YOU UNLOCK THE SAFE? 
THEN PLEASE PRESENT THE KEY.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0021
rows.name: VALIDATING KEY...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0022
rows.name: AUTHENTICATING...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0024
rows.name: THEN PLEASE PRESENT THE REMAINING THREE KEYS.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0025
rows.name: So Briggs has died...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0026
rows.name: He lacked acting skills.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hmm? You look like a pigeon that just got shot with a peashooter. 
Do you want me to explain the situation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013105_SEL0031
rows.name: Demand an explanation as to why Fosdyke is here.

rows.label: qev013105_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev013105_SEL0041
rows.name: Prepare for battle, stating you don't need an explanation.

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0028
rows.name:
I decline. 
This is a secret kept only among us, the Celeste Three... 
No, the Celeste Four.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Fosdyke, don't mess up. 
This one seems different from the usual weaklings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0030
rows.name:
I see... This one seems different from the usual weaklings. 
Fosdyke, be on your guard...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0031
rows.name:
It seems so... 
but [ST:gender p1=he's p2=she's ] no match for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013105_MSG0032
rows.name:
Please ask Briggs about the whole truth in the afterlife! 
Now then... here we go![ST:wait ]
